references.hebrew: בָּר֥וּךְ אַתָּ֖ה בָּעִ֑יר וּבָר֥וּךְ אַתָּ֖ה בַּשָּׂדֶֽה׃
references.english: Blessed shall you be in the city and blessed shall you be in the country.

references.hebrew: בָּר֥וּךְ אַתָּ֖ה בְּבֹאֶ֑ךָ וּבָר֥וּךְ אַתָּ֖ה בְּצֵאתֶֽךָ׃
references.english: Blessed shall you be in your comings and blessed shall you be in your goings.
